---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<div class="about-page">

  <div class="about-clouds">☁️ ☁️</div>

  <h1 class="about-heading">About ☁️</h1>

  <div class="about-card">

    <img src="images/snoopy-balloon.jpg" alt="Snoopy with balloons" class="about-snoopy-left" />

    <div class="about-text">
      <p>
        Hey, Hi, Hello! Thanks for visiting my page, where I take you through my experiences in
        <strong>ISSS608 Visual Analytics and Applications</strong> a small part of my Masters of IT in            Business journey in SMU.
      </p>

      <p>I hope you have as much fun as I did! ☁️</p>


      <div class="about-tags">
        <span class="tag">SMU MITB</span>
        <span class="tag">Visual Analytics</span>
        <span class="tag">ISSS608</span>
        <span class="tag">R &amp; Quarto</span>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <hr class="about-divider" />

  <p class="section-label">Check out my other adventures... 🐾</p>

  <img src="images/snoopy-teacher.jpg" alt="Snoopy teacher" class="about-snoopy-right" />

</div>
```
